input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.4.1.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.4.1.6
            TITLE: green flag – approval to begin your run, enter the course under direction of the starter.  if

            CONTENT:
            rule D.4.1.6: Green Flag – Approval to begin your run, enter the course under direction of the starter.  If
D.4.1.6 Green Flag – Approval to begin your run, enter the course under direction of the starter.  If 
you stall the vehicle, please restart and await another Green Flag

final_answer: rule D.4.1.6: Green Flag – Approval to begin your run, enter the course under direction of the starter. If you stall the vehicle, please restart and await another Green Flag
